meaning: vi.统治,支配,盛行,占优势n.统治,统治时期,支配
examples: In this lecture I shall concentrate on the early years of Charles's reign.
Juan Carlos fired back with a rare public defense of his reign in a recent speech.
North of the border, where price controls reign, those same brand-name drugs cost 50% to 80% less.
Palmisano knew the trajectory of his reign at IBM almost from the time he started.
In a media marketplace heavy on celebrity news, stories are interesting, but pictures reign supreme.
